dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 1744 : United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To extend and authorize annual appropriations for the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom through December 31, 2028.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: United States Commission on International Religious Freedom

subsection.text: Section 207(a) of the International Religious Freedom Act of 1998 (22 U.S.C. 6435(a)) is amended by striking 2025 and 2026 and inserting 2027 and 2028, and for the period beginning on October 1, 2028, and ending on December 31, 2028.
Section 209 of the International Religious Freedom Act of 1998 (22 U.S.C. 6436) is amended by striking September 30, 2026 and inserting December 31, 2028.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives June 8, 2026.
